{
  "issue_category": "UI / Usability",
  "themes": [
    {
      "theme": "App fails to open, load, connect, or respond",
      "frequency": "High - approximately 18-22 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Recent releases appear to have introduced stability, launch, loading, and connectivity defects across devices, browsers, and user environments. Regression testing and release validation appear insufficient.",
      "business_impact": "Residents cannot access core tenancy functions, creating payment, document, communication, and service disruption. This increases support volume, negative reviews, landlord dissatisfaction, and churn risk.",
      "recommendation": "Immediately prioritize a stability remediation sprint, expand device and browser regression testing, implement crash and launch monitoring, and establish executive release gates for app availability before production rollout.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Login, authentication, and account setup barriers",
      "frequency": "Medium-High - approximately 8-10 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Authentication flows, account linking, landlord-to-landlord transitions, verification codes, and mobile setup workflows are confusing or failing without clear recovery paths.",
      "business_impact": "Users are locked out of the platform or unable to register, which prevents access to housing-related services and can create legal, trust, and customer retention risks.",
      "recommendation": "Redesign login and account recovery flows, add clear error messages, provide self-service landlord/account unlinking escalation, and monitor failed-login and failed-registration rates as operational KPIs.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Poor usability, navigation, and accessibility",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 8-10 reviews",
      "root_cause": "The interface is not intuitive for all user segments, especially older users and light-sensitive users. Navigation, app discoverability, dark mode, and guidance are inadequate.",
      "business_impact": "Users abandon the app, rely on workarounds, or require human assistance. Accessibility gaps may increase compliance exposure and reduce adoption among residents and HOA members.",
      "recommendation": "Conduct usability testing with older adults and accessibility-sensitive users, implement dark mode, improve navigation labels, add in-app guidance, and align design standards with WCAG accessibility principles.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Critical in-app tasks and content access are failing",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 4-6 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Specific workflows such as uploading proof of insurance, opening documents, showing accurate balances, and connecting third-party financial services appear unreliable or poorly integrated.",
      "business_impact": "Residents may be unable to prove compliance, review documents, verify payments, or use financial services. This creates operational disputes, manual intervention, and loss of confidence in account accuracy.",
      "recommendation": "Map and test the highest-volume resident workflows end-to-end, create transaction monitoring for upload/document/payment-data failures, and assign product owners to remediate broken workflow paths.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Notification and communication controls are ineffective",
      "frequency": "Low-Medium - approximately 3 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Push notifications are either not working or are underused, while email event notifications are excessive and poorly controlled by user preferences.",
      "business_impact": "Important updates may be missed, while excessive emails create fatigue and reduce engagement. HOA and resident leaders lose time manually checking the app or filtering redundant communication.",
      "recommendation": "Implement reliable push notifications, user-level communication preferences, email digest options, and notification health monitoring for delivery failures.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Insufficient help, onboarding, and support escalation",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 5-7 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Users lack clear setup instructions, release-change notices, browser compatibility guidance, and responsive support when issues occur.",
      "business_impact": "Users spend days or weeks trying to resolve setup and access problems, causing frustration, poor reviews, increased support burden for property managers, and reduced platform trust.",
      "recommendation": "Create guided onboarding, contextual help, known-issue banners, browser compatibility notices, and a defined escalation path for residents unable to access the app.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Trust, privacy, and safety concerns",
      "frequency": "Low - approximately 2-3 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Users perceive the app as enabling scams or collecting personal data through third-party trackers without sufficient transparency, opt-out controls, or timely response.",
      "business_impact": "Even at low frequency, privacy and trust concerns can create reputational damage, app abandonment, regulatory scrutiny, and landlord/customer concern about platform governance.",
      "recommendation": "Review third-party tracking practices, strengthen privacy disclosures, provide opt-out controls where feasible, respond publicly to privacy concerns, and publish a resident-facing trust and safety statement.",
      "priority": "High"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "issue_category": "Payments",
  "themes": [
    {
      "theme": "High payment processing and convenience fees",
      "frequency": "Very high - approximately 25-30% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Fee model places card, debit, credit, and sometimes eCheck transaction costs directly on residents, with poor disclosure and limited low-cost alternatives.",
      "business_impact": "Creates strong resident resentment, perceptions of greed or predatory practices, pressure on property managers to switch platforms, and reputational damage to both the app provider and landlords.",
      "recommendation": "Reassess resident-facing fee structure, negotiate lower merchant costs, provide a free or low-cost ACH option, disclose fees clearly before payment, and offer property managers configurable options to absorb or subsidize fees.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Login, password reset, and account access failures blocking rent payment",
      "frequency": "Very high - approximately 20-25% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Authentication instability, password reset email failures, account activation issues, inactive-account errors, poor session handling, and weak recovery workflows.",
      "business_impact": "Residents cannot pay rent on time, leading to late fees, support escalations, loss of trust, and complaints directed at property managers. This creates operational risk during rent collection periods.",
      "recommendation": "Prioritize authentication reliability, add real-time monitoring for login failures, improve password reset deliverability, provide resident self-service account recovery, and create emergency payment-access protocols during outages.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "App outages, update-related bugs, blank screens, and mobile payment failures",
      "frequency": "High - approximately 15-20% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Insufficient regression testing across devices and operating systems, unstable releases, poor handling of mobile web-to-app redirects, and lack of graceful fallback when the app fails.",
      "business_impact": "Residents are unable to complete payments through the required channel, increasing late-payment disputes, in-person payment burden, and app uninstallations. Property offices absorb the frustration and workload.",
      "recommendation": "Strengthen release quality controls, introduce staged rollouts, expand device/browser testing, maintain a reliable mobile web fallback, and publish outage/status communications during payment-impacting incidents.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Payment method failures and declined transactions despite valid information",
      "frequency": "Medium-high - approximately 10-15% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Payment gateway errors, stale card or bank tokenization, poor validation messaging, limited wallet/payment method support, and unclear coordination between bank, app, and property manager systems.",
      "business_impact": "Valid payments are rejected or delayed, causing late fees, resident anxiety, repeated retries, and increased property manager intervention.",
      "recommendation": "Improve payment failure diagnostics, expose clear error reasons, refresh stored payment tokens reliably, support more payment options where feasible, and create a resident-facing payment escalation path.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Duplicate, unauthorized, or incorrect payment withdrawals",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 8-10% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Autopay execution defects, duplicate transaction processing, poor safeguards against repeated charges, card removal failures, and weak reconciliation controls.",
      "business_impact": "Can cause overdrafts, financial hardship, refund disputes, fraud accusations, regulatory complaints, and severe trust erosion because rent payments are high-value transactions.",
      "recommendation": "Implement duplicate-payment prevention, stronger autopay audit controls, immediate transaction reversal workflows, resident-visible payment history, and confirmation that stored cards/banks are fully removed when requested.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Incorrect balances, rent amounts, late fees, and payment posting issues",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 10-12% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Poor synchronization between property manager ledgers and the resident portal, delayed posting, incorrect charge configuration, missing subsidy calculations, and inadequate balance notifications.",
      "business_impact": "Residents dispute balances, believe they are being overcharged, incur avoidable late fees, and lose confidence in the accuracy of the payment portal.",
      "recommendation": "Improve ledger synchronization, add automated balance-change notifications, require property manager review for unusual charges, provide clear charge breakdowns, and allow residents to dispute charges before payment deadlines.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Limited payment flexibility and resident control",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 8-10% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Rigid product rules around partial payments, multiple bank accounts, recurring payment schedules, payment notes, account switching, and property/unit management.",
      "business_impact": "Residents who split rent, are paid biweekly, manage multiple properties, or need alternate funding methods struggle to pay on time, reducing convenience and increasing manual work for offices.",
      "recommendation": "Add configurable partial payments, multiple stored bank accounts, flexible recurring schedules, payment memo fields, easier property switching, and clearer property-manager controls over allowed payment methods.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Insufficient resident support for payment problems",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 8-10% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Support model routes residents through property managers, with limited direct support, unclear contact channels, slow escalation, and inadequate help documentation.",
      "business_impact": "Payment issues remain unresolved close to rent deadlines, property staff become the front-line support team, and residents blame both the platform and landlord for late fees or blocked payments.",
      "recommendation": "Provide dedicated resident payment support, urgent escalation for rent-blocking issues, in-app support tickets, searchable accurate help content, and service-level agreements for payment-critical incidents.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Mandatory platform use with inadequate alternatives",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 6-8% of reviews",
      "root_cause": "Property managers require the portal for rent payments while the app lacks reliable cross-device access, offline alternatives, or fallback payment workflows.",
      "business_impact": "When the app fails, residents have no viable way to pay, creating avoidable late fees, in-person travel, mailed payments, and tenant dissatisfaction.",
      "recommendation": "Require property managers to maintain at least one no-fee backup payment method, provide desktop/mobile web parity, support emergency payment links, and communicate alternatives clearly inside the portal.",
      "priority": "High"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "issue_category": "Maintenance",
  "themes": [
    {
      "theme": "Maintenance requests fail to submit or load",
      "frequency": "6 of 12 reviews (~50%)",
      "root_cause": "Unstable maintenance request workflow, submission errors, attachment handling failures, and possible regression after replacing or modifying the request form.",
      "business_impact": "Tenants cannot report issues reliably, leading to unresolved maintenance problems, frustration, increased support calls, and potential property damage escalation.",
      "recommendation": "Prioritize stabilization of the maintenance submission flow, including error monitoring, attachment upload testing, rollback capability, and SLA tracking for failed submissions.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "AI chatbot creates friction in maintenance request creation",
      "frequency": "4 of 12 reviews (~33%)",
      "root_cause": "AI assistant appears to have replaced a faster manual form without sufficient usability testing, escalation logic, or support for complex real-world maintenance descriptions.",
      "business_impact": "Longer request times, failed work order creation, tenant dissatisfaction, and reduced adoption of the maintenance portal.",
      "recommendation": "Make the AI assistant optional, restore a direct manual maintenance form, add clear fallback paths, and validate chatbot performance against common and complex maintenance scenarios.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "No response or follow-through after maintenance requests",
      "frequency": "4 of 12 reviews (~33%)",
      "root_cause": "Weak operational follow-up process, unclear ownership of requests, inadequate SLA enforcement, and poor visibility into request status after submission.",
      "business_impact": "Unresolved maintenance issues, tenant churn risk, reputational damage, and increased liability when urgent issues such as water intrusion are ignored.",
      "recommendation": "Implement maintenance response SLAs, automated escalation for aging requests, manager dashboards, and closed-loop tenant confirmation before marking work complete.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Poor tenant-to-maintenance communication",
      "frequency": "3 of 12 reviews (~25%)",
      "root_cause": "The workflow does not adequately support tenant replies, two-way messaging, language accessibility, or reliable contact with maintenance staff.",
      "business_impact": "Maintenance teams may lack needed information, tenants feel ignored, requests stall, and urgent issues may be mishandled.",
      "recommendation": "Add two-way messaging within active requests, tenant reply notifications, multilingual support, and escalation options when maintenance or office staff are unreachable.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Data accuracy and compliance concerns in maintenance records",
      "frequency": "1 of 12 reviews (~8%)",
      "root_cause": "Potential defects or AI processing issues may be altering, omitting, or incorrectly generating maintenance-related information and billing references.",
      "business_impact": "Creates legal, billing, audit, and trust risks, especially if maintenance records are needed for disputes, habitability claims, or compliance reviews.",
      "recommendation": "Audit AI-generated and system-generated maintenance records, preserve original tenant-submitted text, maintain immutable activity logs, and review billing number generation controls.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "issue_category": "Authentication",
  "themes": [
    {
      "theme": "Users cannot log in or are trapped in a login loop",
      "frequency": "Very High - approximately 31 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Likely authentication session handling defects, failed token exchange, broken redirect/callback flows, timeout/loading failures, or regressions in the app login state machine after recent releases.",
      "business_impact": "Users are blocked from paying rent, viewing balances, submitting maintenance requests, and accessing lease information. This creates high frustration, support volume, negative app ratings, and property-manager dissatisfaction.",
      "recommendation": "Make login failure the top incident priority. Establish an executive-owned authentication reliability program, add real-time login success-rate monitoring, capture failed-login funnel analytics by app version/device, and require release-blocking QA for login flows before deployment.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Password reset and credential recovery failures",
      "frequency": "High - approximately 20 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Password reset workflow appears unreliable due to missing reset emails or codes, reset links looping back to the app, inconsistent password validation, and accounts being marked as both registered and unregistered.",
      "business_impact": "Users who forget passwords or are forced to reset credentials become permanently locked out. This increases call center burden and damages trust in the platform's security and usability.",
      "recommendation": "Redesign and audit the password reset journey end to end. Validate email delivery, reset-token expiration, deep-link routing, password policy messaging, and account lookup logic. Add automated monitoring for reset completion rates and failed reset attempts.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "New users cannot create or set up accounts",
      "frequency": "High - approximately 12 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Onboarding flow is unclear or incomplete, with users taken directly to sign-in pages, missing sign-up options, broken invitation/setup links, and insufficient guidance for first-time users.",
      "business_impact": "New tenants or residents cannot activate accounts, delaying adoption and preventing digital self-service. This undermines onboarding for property managers and may force manual support or offline payment processes.",
      "recommendation": "Create a clearly separated first-time setup flow with visible account creation, invitation recovery, property-code support, and contextual instructions. Require product leadership to review onboarding conversion metrics weekly until activation failures decline.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Authentication emails, verification messages, and codes are not received",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 9 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Probable email deliverability issues, suppression-list problems, domain reputation issues, incorrect sender configuration, or mismatched account records preventing verification and reset emails from being generated.",
      "business_impact": "Users cannot verify accounts, receive invite links, reset passwords, or complete authentication. This blocks access and creates the perception that the app is unreliable even when the user's email works elsewhere.",
      "recommendation": "Conduct an email deliverability audit covering SPF, DKIM, DMARC, bounce handling, suppression lists, and transactional email logs. Add user-visible resend options, alternate verification methods, and support tooling to confirm whether emails were sent.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Account identity and property association conflicts",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 6 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Tenant identity records appear to be incorrectly linked to old properties, stale portals, prior apartment accounts, or conflicting email records. Account lookup may not properly handle property transfers or email changes.",
      "business_impact": "Residents may see old property information, be unable to access their current portal, or be told their account both exists and does not exist. This creates billing visibility risk and reduces trust in property data integrity.",
      "recommendation": "Prioritize a data-quality initiative for tenant identity resolution and property reassignment. Give support and property managers tools to unlink stale accounts, merge duplicate records, update emails safely, and resend correct portal invitations.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "MFA, authenticator, barcode, and verification-step failures",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 5 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Multi-factor authentication setup and validation appear fragile, including valid codes being rejected, missing authorization barcodes, repeated verification prompts, and inaccessible authentication setup paths.",
      "business_impact": "Security controls are blocking legitimate users, increasing lockouts and frustration. If unresolved, users may pressure property managers to bypass secure workflows or abandon the app.",
      "recommendation": "Audit MFA setup, recovery, and validation logic. Add fallback recovery options, clearer setup instructions, support-assisted MFA reset, and monitoring for invalid-code rejection rates by app version and authenticator type.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Device, app update, and browser redirect-specific authentication defects",
      "frequency": "Medium - approximately 10 of 66 reviews",
      "root_cause": "Authentication behavior varies by Android device, tablet, app update, saved-password integration, embedded browser, and external browser redirects. Recent releases may have introduced platform-specific regressions.",
      "business_impact": "Users who previously had access suddenly lose it after updates or on specific devices. This causes rating drops, support escalation, and reduces confidence in app updates.",
      "recommendation": "Expand regression testing across Android versions, tablets, foldable devices, saved-password managers, embedded webviews, and browser handoffs. Implement staged rollouts with authentication health gates and rapid rollback criteria.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "issue_category": "Other Operational Issue",
  "themes": [
    {
      "theme": "Application not working, loading failures, freezes, and general instability",
      "frequency": "Approx. 14 of 46 reviews, about 30%",
      "root_cause": "Insufficient application reliability testing, weak release quality control, unresolved production defects, and possible backend performance or connectivity issues.",
      "business_impact": "Users are unable to complete basic tasks, creating frustration, poor app ratings, increased support demand, and risk of customer churn.",
      "recommendation": "Launch an executive-sponsored reliability improvement program focused on crash analytics, load monitoring, defect backlog reduction, regression testing, and stricter release readiness gates.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Login, portal access, password setup, and account registration issues",
      "frequency": "Approx. 12 of 46 reviews, about 26%",
      "root_cause": "Poor authentication workflow design, unclear onboarding paths, inadequate password setup validation, and insufficient self-service recovery options.",
      "business_impact": "Customers cannot access the portal or start using the service, leading to abandoned onboarding, higher support volume, and reduced trust in the platform.",
      "recommendation": "Redesign the login and registration journey, add clear account creation prompts, improve password setup guidance, strengthen error messaging, and monitor login failure rates by device and user segment.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Device, browser, and operating system compatibility problems",
      "frequency": "Approx. 6 of 46 reviews, about 13%",
      "root_cause": "Limited cross-platform testing across Android models, Chromebook, desktop browsers, and newer device versions; possible compatibility regression after updates.",
      "business_impact": "Users on common devices cannot install, open, or use the product, reducing reachable customer base and increasing negative reviews after updates.",
      "recommendation": "Expand certified device and browser testing coverage, implement compatibility test automation, publish supported platform requirements, and prioritize fixes for Galaxy, Chromebook, and desktop installation issues.",
      "priority": "High"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Poor support experience and difficulty getting assistance",
      "frequency": "Approx. 4 of 46 reviews, about 9%",
      "root_cause": "Inadequate customer support escalation paths, unclear help channels, slow response processes, and weak ownership of unresolved technical issues.",
      "business_impact": "Customers feel ignored or given the runaround, which intensifies dissatisfaction and converts solvable issues into reputational damage.",
      "recommendation": "Create a dedicated support workflow for access and functionality failures, define escalation SLAs, add in-app support routing, and track repeat-contact and unresolved-ticket metrics at executive level.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Workflow and feature gaps affecting lease signing, notifications, tracking, bill splitting, and missing information",
      "frequency": "Approx. 7 of 46 reviews, about 15%",
      "root_cause": "Product workflows may not fully reflect resident use cases, roommate payment scenarios, document tracking needs, and notification reliability requirements.",
      "business_impact": "Users cannot complete important operational tasks smoothly, which lowers perceived product value and may drive manual workarounds or support contacts.",
      "recommendation": "Prioritize user journey mapping for lease signing, payment splitting, notifications, and status tracking; create a product roadmap tied to the highest-friction resident workflows.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Trust, security, pricing, and negative brand perception concerns",
      "frequency": "Approx. 6 of 46 reviews, about 13%",
      "root_cause": "Poor communication around security incidents, perceived lack of transparency, unclear pricing/value proposition, and accumulation of unresolved service issues.",
      "business_impact": "Customers perceive the company as unprofessional or untrustworthy, increasing reputational risk and reducing willingness to adopt or continue using the platform.",
      "recommendation": "Improve executive-level communication on security, pricing, and service reliability; publish clear incident updates where appropriate; and address recurring operational defects that are driving scam or exploitation perceptions.",
      "priority": "Medium"
    },
    {
      "theme": "Usability and accessibility dissatisfaction",
      "frequency": "Approx. 5 of 46 reviews, about 11%",
      "root_cause": "Confusing interface design, limited accessibility or personalization options such as dark mode, and unclear navigation for new users.",
      "business_impact": "Even when the system works, users perceive it as difficult, irrelevant, or not helpful, reducing engagement and satisfaction.",
      "recommendation": "Conduct usability testing with new and existing users, simplify navigation, improve in-app guidance, and evaluate high-demand experience improvements such as dark mode.",
      "priority": "Low"
    }
  ]
}
